skill.summary: High-speed NFT mint bot for Ethereum and EVM chains. Use when the user wants to snipe NFT mints, speed-mint collections, set up multi-wallet minting bots, configure mint sniping with pre-signed transactions, or automate NFT minting across multiple wallets. Supports ERC721A, Archetype contracts, Flashbots, war mode gas, WebSocket monitoring, mempool watching, and batch minting with 100+ wallets.

latestVersion.changelog: High-speed NFT mint bot - multi-wallet, Archetype support, war mode gas, Flashbots, WebSocket monitoring, mempool watching, batch minting 200+ wallets
